ingredients.description: Cooking this mushroom enhances its nutritional value. Curiously, it's also quite filling.

ingredients.name: BLT
ingredients.description: A dish where bacon, Lettuce , Tomato are sandwiched in Bread . Consumption increases Attack by +15% for a while.

ingredients.name: Bolognese Sauce
ingredients.description: A pasta dish combined with meat sauce. Eating it makes it difficult for sanity to decrease and provides Attack +10% for a while.

ingredients.name: Bread
ingredients.description: Bread made from baked Flour . A tasty staple food.

ingredients.name: Broiled Dumud
ingredients.description: Grilled fish slathered with a secret sauce. Soothes both mind and body. Perfect for tired Pal Tamers.

ingredients.name: Broncherry Fried Noodles
ingredients.description: A dish made by stir-frying noodles with vegetables and meat. The rich seasoning pairs perfectly with the thick cuts of meat. Eating it will increase your Attack by 20% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Broncherry Meat
ingredients.description: Broncherry meat. Giant meat full of massive stores of energy. Stuffed to the brim with nutrients gathered through photosynthesis.

ingredients.name: Broncherry Rib Roast
ingredients.description: Grilled meat brimming with the flavor of the king of the wilds. Juices from the compressed meat flow from the bone, making it surprisingly tender despite the initial toughness.

ingredients.name: Cake
ingredients.description: A dish eaten during celebrations. Put it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.

ingredients.name: Caprity Meat
ingredients.description: Caprity meat. Healthy and full of nutrients. Hints of berries scenting the meat stimulates the appetite.

ingredients.name: Caramel Cotton Candy
ingredients.description: Caramel cotton candy collected from Woolipop Terra . Its fluffy sweetness melts away in your mouth.

ingredients.name: Carbonara
ingredients.description: A dish mixing pasta with Egg and Milk . Eating it makes it improves Defense by +20% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Carrot
ingredients.description: A vibrant, nutrient-rich root vegetable. Not suitable for raw consumption.

ingredients.name: Cavern Mushroom
ingredients.description: Mushroom that grows prolifically in caves. Can be made into healing medicine.

ingredients.name: Cheeseburger
ingredients.description: A meal made with a Hamburger with cheese squeezed between it. Upon consumption, it increases the satiety level for a certain period as well as Defense +10%.

ingredients.name: Chikipi Poultry
ingredients.description: Chikipi meat. Light and easy to eat, it's a local favorite for residents of Palpagos Island.

ingredients.name: Chikipi Sauté
ingredients.description: Plump poultry sautéed in butter. Accented with fresh lemons. Eating it will slightly increase work speed for a period of time.

ingredients.description: Cotton candy collected from Woolipop . Its sweetness fluffily melts away in your mouth.

ingredients.description: Dumud lavishly covered in a thick, creamy soup. Eating it will increase work speed and stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Egg
ingredients.description: Delicious when fried, but can also be used to cook various meals. Chikipi produce them.

ingredients.name: Eikthyrdeer Loco Moco
ingredients.description: Thick hamburger steak accented with a creamy fried egg. This sublime combination brings pure joy to the mouths of those who eat it. Eating it will increase Attack by +20% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Eikthyrdeer Stew
ingredients.description: A tender, melt-in-your-mouth venison stew crafted with love. The intertwining flavors of vegetables and meat create a harmonious blend that brings out a comforting richness. Eating it will increase Defense by +20% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Eikthyrdeer Venison
ingredients.description: Eikthyrdeer meat. Light and lean, but rich in flavor.

ingredients.name: Extravagant Vegetable Cake
ingredients.description: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. Mutations are more likely to occur, and talents will grow more easily.

ingredients.name: Fried Chikipi
ingredients.description: Magnificently juicy poultry. Eating it will slightly increase work speed and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

ingredients.description: An Egg now fried and even more delicious. Great for keeping hunger away.

ingredients.name: Fried Gloopie Balls
ingredients.description: Gloopie Tentacle encased in a Flour dough and grilled into round bites. Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Fried Kelpsea
ingredients.description: Crunchy fried batter perfectly accentuates the Kelpsea's plumpness. Eating it will increase Defense by +10% and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

ingredients.description: A dish made by simmering meat and potatoes in a sweet and savory sauce. It has a mysteriously nostalgic taste. Eating it will increase your Defense by 25% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Galeclaw Poultry
ingredients.description: Galeclaw meat. Full of nutrition, its flavor packs a punch.

ingredients.name: Gloopie Tentacle
ingredients.description: Gloopie tentacle. Known for its springy texture and light, refined flavor.

ingredients.name: Gratin
ingredients.description: A dish made by coating potatoes with sauce and baking them to perfection. Best enjoyed hot and fresh. Eating it will provide lasting fullness and increase your Defense by 10% for a period of time.

ingredients.description: Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire. Light and refreshing on the tongue.

ingredients.name: Grilled Kelpsea

ingredients.description: Marinated mutton slow-cooked over a grill. Eating it will slightly increase work speed and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Grilled Meat
ingredients.description: Grilled meat. A full stomach leads to smiling faces.

ingredients.name: Hamburger
ingredients.description: A dish where a hamburger, Lettuce the Tomato are contained in the Bread . When eaten, it boosts one's stomach fullness and Attack by +10% for a while.

ingredients.name: Herb Roasted Caprity
ingredients.description: Mild roast filled with the natural aromas of herbs and berries embedded in the meat. Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.

ingredients.name: Herb Roasted Lamball
ingredients.description: Indulging in an abundance of fresh berries creates a tantalizing aroma that accentuates the unique flavor of mutton. Eating it will increase Defense by +10% for a period of time.

ingredients.description: Honey harvested from Beegarde . It's sweet and tasty.

ingredients.description: Even more delicious when warmed up. Great for keeping hunger away.

ingredients.name: Jam-Filled Bun
ingredients.description: Bread with jam spread on it. The sweetness of the berries complements it perfectly.

ingredients.name: Jelliette Bell Flesh
ingredients.description: Jelliette 's fleshy bell. Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully chewy bite.

ingredients.name: Jelliette's Jiggly Jelly
ingredients.description: An unusual treat crafted from Jelliette Bell Flesh and Aquatic Pal Fluids . Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain and increase Attack by +10% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Jellroy Bell Flesh
ingredients.description: Jellroy 's fleshy bell. Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully plump texture.

ingredients.name: Jellroy's Jolly Jelly
ingredients.description: An unusual treat crafted from Jellroy Bell Flesh and Red Berries . Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain and increase Defense by +10% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Lamball Kebab
ingredients.description: Spiced and roasted mutton. Deeply complex with unique flavors.

ingredients.name: Lamball Mutton
ingredients.description: Lamball meat. Red meat with a unique flavor. Delicious, but takes some getting used to.

ingredients.name: Lettuce

ingredients.name: Mammorest Curry
ingredients.description: A dish made by simmering vegetables and meat with spices. The rich flavor is highlighted by large chunks of tender meat. Eating it will increase your Attack by 25% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Mammorest Meat
ingredients.description: Mammorest meat. With massive size comes massive flavor. Its overwhelming portions are sure to satisfy any glutton.

ingredients.name: Mammorest Steak
ingredients.description: Boasts a rich and dignified flavor. Memories of glaciers and deep forests come rushing back with every bite.

ingredients.name: Marinated Mushrooms
ingredients.description: A dish made by marinating Mushroom s in a marinade. Eating it improves Defense by +10% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.description: Drink it as is, or use it in various meals. Can be milked from Mozzarina .

ingredients.name: Minestrone
ingredients.description: A soup simmered with a variety of vegetables. Drinking it warms you to the core. Eating it will increase your work speed for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Mozzarina Cheeseburger
ingredients.description: Now with cheese, this dish has reached the highest level of fine cuisine. Eating it will increase Attack by +20% and stay full longer for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Mozzarina Hamburger
ingredients.description: The rich flavor of beef melds with the sweetness of the buns in perfect harmony in this masterpiece. Eating it will increase work speed and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Mozzarina Meat
ingredients.description: Mozzarina meat. Thick, juicy and marbled. Residents of Palpagos Island cherish it above all other meats.

ingredients.name: Mozzarina Steak
ingredients.description: Thick, well-done steak. Strong flavors give those who eat it an energy boost.

ingredients.name: Munchill Meat
ingredients.description: Munchill meat. Has a satisfying chew that brings out layers of umami as you eat.

ingredients.name: Munchill Steak
ingredients.description: Charcoal-grilled to perfection, this steak offers a crispy exterior and melt-in-your-mouth juiciness. Unique compounds seal in flavor and enhance shelf life.

ingredients.name: Mushroom
ingredients.description: A mushroom that can be eaten raw. They can be found anywhere on the island.

ingredients.name: Mushroom Cake
ingredients.description: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. The talents of the resulting Pals will grow slightly more easily.

ingredients.name: Mushroom Quiche
ingredients.description: A dish made by baking a pastry crust filled with eggs, vegetables, mushrooms, and cream. It’s delicious even when cooled. Eating it will help you stay fuller for a while and make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Mushroom Soup
ingredients.description: Cream soup made of Mushroom s. Eating it allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Mushroom Stew
ingredients.description: A stew made with Mushroom . Consumption elevates work speed and offers Attack +10% for a particular duration.

ingredients.name: Mysterious Mushroom
ingredients.description: Mushrooms that are not suitable for eating raw. Eating makes one more prone to feeling hungry.

ingredients.name: Omelet
ingredients.description: A dish made by frying an Egg and topping it with ketchup. Eating it improves Attack by +10% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.description: A cherished and easy-to-grow vegetable with a rich history. Not suitable for eating raw.

ingredients.name: Pancake
ingredients.description: A dish made by mixing Flour and Milk together then baking. Eating it progressively decreases the rate at which one's sanity decreases for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Pizza
ingredients.description: A dish made by piling Red Berries , Tomato and cheese on Bread . Eating it slightly improves work speed and allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Raw Dumud
ingredients.description: Dumud meat. Fatty with a rich taste. Has a mouthwatering plump texture.

ingredients.name: Raw Kelpsea
ingredients.description: Kelpsea meat. Tender and slightly sweet. Fish meat tends to spoil quickly.

ingredients.name: Raw Meat
ingredients.description: Pal meat. It’s so fresh that even a human could safely eat it raw.

ingredients.name: Red Berries
ingredients.description: A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked. They can be found anywhere on the island.

ingredients.name: Reindrix Stew
ingredients.description: Stewed vegetables and venison that was reared in a frigid environment. The meat's soft texture melts away to reveal a delicate sweetness. Eating it will stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Reindrix Venison
ingredients.description: Reindrix meat. Strange venison capable of remaining at low temperatures. Takes a very long time to spoil.

ingredients.name: Roast Eikthyrdeer
ingredients.description: Carefully roasted venison with delicate flavor notes, accented by the aromas of the deep forest. Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.

ingredients.name: Roast Reindrix
ingredients.description: When taken from a flame, Reindrix meat rapidly drops in temperature. This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time, making it a perfect emergency ration.

ingredients.name: Roast Rushoar
ingredients.description: Boar grilled over a hearty flame. Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside. Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.

ingredients.name: Rushoar Bacon 'n' Eggs
ingredients.description: The smoky essence of bacon intertwines flawlessly with the gentle texture of eggs, creating a sublime harmony of flavors. Eating it will increase Attack by +10% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Rushoar Gyoza
ingredients.description: A dish made by wrapping a filling of mushrooms and meat in wheat flour and boiling it. The chewy texture is irresistible. Eating it improves your Attack by 10% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Rushoar Hot Dog
ingredients.description: Thick sausage wedged between warm buns. The crisply seared meat and spicy flavors are to die for. Eating it will increase Defense by +20% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Rushoar Pork
ingredients.description: Rushoar meat. Full of the delicious flavors of wild game. Juicy and nutritious.

ingredients.name: Salad
ingredients.description: A Salad made by mixing Lettuce and Tomato . Eating it slightly improves work speed for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Salt-Grilled Skutlass
ingredients.description: Fresh fillets of Skutlass salted and grilled into a simple dish. When eaten, it nullifies knockback and flinching for a certain period of time.

ingredients.name: Sandwich
ingredients.description: Sandwich

ingredients.name: Seafood Pasta
ingredients.description: Fresh pasta is tossed with fragrant seafood in this exceptional dish, using Gloopie tentacles to elevate it even further. When eaten, it nullifies damage from explosions for a certain period of time.

ingredients.name: Seafood Salad
ingredients.description: A healthy salad made with Gloopie Tentacle and Lettuce . Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Seafood Soup
ingredients.description: Seafood Soup

ingredients.name: Skutlass Sashimi
ingredients.description: Raw slices of Skutlass . Characterized by its supple, plump flesh. Caution is required when preparing it due to its sword-like spine.

ingredients.name: Special Cake
ingredients.description: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. More likely inherit multiple passive skills from their parents.

ingredients.name: Spring Rolls
ingredients.description: A dish made by wrapping vegetables and mushrooms in a thin skin and deep-frying them. The crispy texture is delightful. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease and increase your Attack by 10% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Stew
ingredients.description: Stew

ingredients.name: Stewed Galeclaw
ingredients.description: Slow-cooked dish that exudes a burst of rich, wild flavors. Eating it will make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Stir-Fried Vegetables
ingredients.description: A dish made by stir-frying Carrot and Onion . A simple and delicious way to enjoy vegetables. Eating it will slightly increase your work speed and improve your Defense by 10% for a period of time.

ingredients.name: Stir-Fried Veggies
ingredients.description: A dish prepared by stir frying Lettuce and Raw Meat . When eaten, it will temporarily increase Attack by +10%.

ingredients.name: Tomato
ingredients.description: A fresh ingredient that brightens any dish. Filled with lycopene, they’re also very healthy.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Cake
ingredients.description: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. Lay eggs twice at once.
